metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_4981
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 2: Ultrastructures of synapses imaged using EM are not altered between wildtype and DJ-1 (PARK7) knockout neurons.

Figure 3: Primary cultured cortical neurons from wildtype and DJ-1 knockout mice were transfected with vGlut1-pHluorin (its fluorescence can be used to monitor endocytosed vesicles). DJ-1 knockout resulted in significant defects of SV endocytosis, which was completely rescued upon reexpression of wildtype DJ-1. Authors summarised these results as; "Based on these findings, we concluded that DJ-1 plays an important role in SV endocytosis during and after neural activity.". Experimental description: M&M: "DJ-1 KO mice were kindly provided by U. J. Kang at the Department of Neurology, University of Chicago, Chicago, IL" PMID:15799973
